[`INTERNET SAFETY ADVISORY`]

PLEASE BE ADVISED, AUTHORITIES HAVE ISSUED A DIRE WARNING TO ALL INTERNET USERS FOLLOWING EVIDENCE A LEAKED DOCUMENT; 'HUMAN DOMESTICATION PROJECT', MAY BE LINKED TO AN INCREASE IN INTERNATIONAL DISAPPEARANCES AND MISSING PERSONS.

THIS ADVISORY FOLLOWS A YEAR AFTER THE INCARCERATION OF 40 YEAR OLD DR. CAITLIN ADAMANTHEA MASTERSON, ARCHITECH OF THE CONTROVERSIAL DISSERTATION AND EXPERIMENT.

[`INTERNET SAFETY ADVISORY`]

URGENT: AUTHORITIES HAVE NOW RELEASED EVIDENCE THAT AN UNDERGROUND GROUP DUBBING THEMSELVES 'THE PUPPY-MILL' IS INEXORABLY LINKED TO THE DRASTIC INCREASE IN INTERNATIONAL DISAPPEARANCES AND MISSING PERSONS.

CYBERWATCH ADVISES AN INCREASED AWARENESS REGARDING INTERNET SAFETY AND SECURITY, ISSUING THE FOLLOWING GUIDELINES:

1. BE WARY OF ANY UNFAMILIAR DEVICE OR ACCOUNT ACTIVITY

2. BE WARY OF UNKOWN APPS OR EMAILS

3. BE WARY OF SUDDEN CONTACT WITH SUSPICIOUS INDIVIDUALS; THIS GROUP IS KNOWN TO USE SOCIAL ENGINEERING AND MANIPULATION TO EXPOLIT TRUST

BE PROACTIVE IN YOUR OWN PROTECTION ONLINE:

1. SECURE YOUR DEVICES - ENABLE TWO-FACTOR AUTHENTIFICATION, REGUARLY UPDATE ANTI-VIRUS SOFTWARE AND OPERATING SYSTEMS, AVOID CLICKING ON OR OPENING UNVERIFIED LINKS AND ATTACHMENTS

2. SECURE YOUR INFORMATION - BE CAUTIOUS OF OVERSHARING PERSONAL INFORMATION WITH OTHER USERS AND ON SOCIAL MEDIA

3. REPORT SUSPICIOUS ACTIVITY - CONTACT YOUR LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT, CYBERCRIME UNIT, OR NATIONAL INVESTIGATION ADMINISTRATION

US - www.%IC3%.gov
